meta.name: Tiptrip — Longbow Roadster Adaptation
meta.description: An editorial automotive presentation language adapted into a route-first Android travel product website: engineering grid, silver monochrome, condensed display type, instrument-like labels, and cinematic scroll pacing with Tiptrip blue as the sole brand accent.
source_references: Tiptrip Android app icon and current product feature set

primary.role: machined-silver hero field and neutral visual stage

secondary.role: cinematic information sections and high-contrast footer

accent.role: Tiptrip route line, active controls, CTA emphasis, and product identity

neutral.usage: White for display text, silver for image fields, graphite for dividers and secondary copy, near-black for long-form sections.

color.contrast_strategy: Extreme black/white contrast with translucent charcoal overlays; blue is reserved for directional meaning.

typography.font_style_notes: Condensed display capitals supply automotive scale; a restrained Chinese serif adds editorial warmth; monospaced labels behave like route telemetry.

spacing.content_density: spacious stages with compact data clusters
spacing.section_rhythm: Full-viewport visual beats alternate with 96–144px editorial sections and dense 24–32px specification rows.

layout.grid_system: 8-column engineering grid with visible rules and square intersections
layout.gutter: 0px for visual stages; 24–48px internal component padding
layout.alignment_tendency: strict grid with deliberate oversized crop and asymmetric copy placement

shape.border_usage: Hairline grid borders dominate; radius is reserved for floating navigation, phone hardware, and marker chips.

elevation.shadow_style: soft diffused only on floating hardware
elevation.depth_cues: Overlapping layers, sticky scale changes, translucent surfaces, and route-line glow

iconography.style: minimal geometric route glyphs and instrument markers
iconography.preferred_set: custom inline SVG with rounded joins

motion.entrance_pattern: clip reveal and vertical rise with controlled stagger
motion.exit_pattern: opacity falloff with slight upward drift
motion.philosophy: cinematic but mechanical; movement explains sequence and direction

components.button_style: White rectangular utility CTA on dark surfaces; blue route CTA for the product moment; arrow or plus on the trailing edge.
components.input_style: Dark telemetry panel with monospaced label, subtle border, and blue focus state.
components.card_style: Border-defined grid cell, near-zero decoration, oversized numeral, compact instrument metadata.
components.navigation_pattern: Centered fixed translucent capsule with menu label, brand mark, and compact CTA.
components.modal_style: Full-viewport charcoal sheet with strict grid and oversized title.
components.list_style: Numbered itinerary rows linked by a continuous blue route rail.
components.component_notes: Product mockups use real UI copy, blue attraction markers, red food markers, and route segments that animate in order.

aesthetic.visual_metaphor: A route-planning instrument presented like a lightweight performance machine.
aesthetic.era_influence: Contemporary automotive editorial with analog technical-sheet references.

visual_language.whitespace_usage: expansive negative space broken by full-bleed product stages
visual_language.visual_weight_distribution: one dominant image or phone object per viewport with compact metadata at edges
visual_language.focal_strategy: single hero element followed by progressive reveal
visual_language.texture_usage: light film grain and faint coordinate grid

composition.hierarchy_method: scale contrast, crop, spatial isolation, and typographic layering
composition.balance_type: asymmetric within a strict modular grid
composition.flow_direction: vertical cinematic sequence with route-like downward progression
composition.grouping_strategy: feature pairs grouped as instrument cards and day-by-day route segments
composition.negative_space_role: Creates premium pacing and makes each product behavior feel singular.

imagery.photo_treatment: desaturated silver stage, hard directional crop, minimal backdrop
imagery.illustration_style: UI-native map diagrams and route paths rather than decorative illustration
imagery.graphic_elements: visible grid lines, node squares, huge cropped type, coordinate labels, numbered markers
imagery.pattern_usage: repeating engineering grid and telemetry ticker
imagery.image_shape: full-bleed rectangular field with hardware silhouette layered above

interaction_feel.feedback_style: immediate color inversion and route-line response
interaction_feel.hover_behavior: magnetic lift, trailing arrow shift, and highlighted grid cell
interaction_feel.loading_style: route path draws first, content follows
interaction_feel.microinteraction_density: selective; concentrated on navigation, CTA, itinerary reorder, and map markers

brand_voice_in_ui.empty_state_approach: one clear next action with an example request

overview.fallback_strategy: Disable scroll transforms and route drawing; retain static high-contrast composition.

background_effects.description: A nearly invisible film-grain layer softens the flat silver and black surfaces.

particle_systems.description: No particle system; the route nodes provide sufficient visual activity.

3d_elements.description: Depth is simulated through CSS perspective on the phone mockup.

shader_effects.description: No shader is required for this lightweight adaptation.

scroll_triggered_animations.scrub_behavior: triggered once; sticky scenes use scrubbed CSS variables

scroll_morphing.description: The central route motif shifts from prompt to recommendations to mapped itinerary while the phone remains visually anchored.

text_effects.description: Oversized titles reveal by line through a clipping mask; telemetry ticker moves continuously.

cursor_effects.description: A restrained blue halo follows the pointer only on the desktop hero stage.

image_effects.description: The phone hardware tilts by a maximum of four degrees and settles on pointer leave.

canvas_drawings.description: All maps are semantic HTML and SVG for crisp rendering and accessibility.

svg_animations.description: The Tiptrip blue route draws through numbered attraction nodes while food nodes pulse red.

visual_effects.composite_notes: The implementation deliberately borrows the reference's structural DNA—not its automotive assets. It substitutes an original HTML/CSS phone and route system, keeping performance lightweight. Reduced-motion users receive a static route and immediately visible content.
